mapper.sql: id AS "id", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", client_code AS "clientCode", brand_code AS "brandCode", service_product_code AS "serviceProductCode", external_order_code AS "externalOrderCode", status AS "status", configuration_bundle_id AS "configurationBundleId", configuration_bundle_code AS "configurationBundleCode", configuration_bundle_version AS "configurationBundleVersion", configuration_bundle_digest AS "configurationBundleDigest", province_code AS "provinceCode", city_code AS "cityCode", district_code AS "districtCode", external_dispatched_at AS "externalDispatchedAt", received_at AS "receivedAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt", activated_at AS "activatedAt", fulfilled_at AS "fulfilledAt", version AS "version"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM wo_work_order WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{workOrderId}

SELECT id AS "workOrderId", customer_name AS "customerName", customer_mobile AS "customerMobile", service_address AS "serviceAddress" FROM wo_work_order WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{workOrderId}

SELECT position_code AS "positionCode", principal_id AS "principalId", principal_name AS "displayName", requested_region_code AS "requestedRegionCode", matched_region_code AS "matchedRegionCode", matched_region_name AS "matchedRegionName", match_status AS "matchStatus", inherited, matched_at AS "matchedAt", adjustment_reason AS "adjustmentReason" FROM wo_project_personnel_snapshot WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND work_order_id=#{workOrderId} AND snapshot_status='CURRENT' ORDER BY CASE position_code WHEN 'CUSTOMER_SERVICE_MANAGER' THEN 1 WHEN 'PROJECT_MANAGER' THEN 2 WHEN 'PROJECT_ASSISTANT' THEN 3 ELSE 99 END
